testcase.name: test_message_flow_and_memory

failure.message: AssertionError: AI didn't remember startup name. Got: you haven't shared your startup's name with me yet—tell me what it's called so we can start building! assert 'pixelforge' in "you haven't shared your startup's name with me yet—tell me what it's called so we can start building!"

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:339: in test_message_flow_and_memory assert "pixelforge" in reply, f"AI didn't remember startup name. Got: {reply[:200]}" E AssertionError: AI didn't remember startup name. Got: you haven't shared your startup's name with me yet—tell me what it's called so we can start building! E assert 'pixelforge' in "you haven't shared your startup's name with me yet—tell me what it's called so we can start building!"
